items.title: Timberwolves Cap Space Update After Declining Julian Phillips' Option
items.author: Sports Illustrated
items.body_excerpt: Timberwolves Cap Space Update After Declining Julian Phillips' Option Sports Illustrated

items.title: The Timberwolves are declining Julian Phillips's team option per Jon Krawczynski of the Athletic
items.author: Ryan Eichten
items.body_excerpt:
The Timberwolves are declining Julian Phillips's team option per Jon Krawczynski of the Athletic

The Wolves open up a roster spot by letting go of a player set to make about $50,000 below the league minimum

They now have 3 open roster spots they will need to fill and about $8 million to do it

items.title: The Minnesota Timberwolves will decline their $2.41 million team option on Julian Phillips and will not extend him a qualifying offer, thus making him an unrestricted free agent, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Minnesota Timberwolves will decline their $2.41 million team option on Julian Phillips and will not extend him a qualifying offer, thus making him an unrestricted free agent, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social
